content:
# Baidoa Aquifer

**Summary**: A groundwater aquifer in Somalia characterized by varying TDS levels.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-moallim|Moallim, 1993]] analyzed the Baidoa aquifer to determine its water quality and suitability for use.

## Depositional Environment



## Reservoir Properties

- [[1993-moallim|Moallim, 1993]] TDS 756-1816 mg/L

## Key Findings Across Sources

- TDS values range from 756 mg/L in the northern part to 1816 mg/L in the southern part of the aquifer. ([[1993-moallim|Moallim, 1993, p. 174]])
